trivia_bullets.text: Common Human Soldier, THB original print only. Name and flavor text tie directly to the Iroan Games — Theros's annual athletic competition held at Akros, governed by Iroas god of victory; the Games award a visit from Iroas himself rather than a material prize.
sources: MTG Wiki: Iroas via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: "Winners of the Iroan Games are forever remembered as heroes of their people." No attributed speaker — framed as received cultural fact, not testimony.

Hipsters of the Coast common review grade F: '3/2s for three need more than minor upside to get there.' The pump-on-spell-target ability requires build-around and doesn't offset below-curve stats in aggro. Legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: THB Common Review 2020-01

trivia_bullets.text: THB includes the saga The First Iroan Games (no. 170), depicting the founding of these very games — Hero of the Games and that saga are a flavor-cycle pair across rarity.
sources: Scryfall: The First Iroan Games THB 170

related_cards.name: The First Iroan Games
related_cards.note: The saga depicting the games this hero competes in

related_cards.name: Iroas, God of Victory
related_cards.note: The god who presides over the Iroan Games
